name: Ventouse Delivery
description: Instrumental vaginal delivery using vacuum extraction.

name: Forceps Delivery
description: Instrumental vaginal delivery using forceps.

name: Rotational Forceps Delivery
description: Operative vaginal delivery using rotational forceps for malposition.

name: Episiotomy and Repair
description: Episiotomy with surgical repair following delivery.

name: Repair of Obstetric Perineal Trauma
description: Repair of perineal tear sustained during childbirth.

name: Repair of Third or Fourth Degree Perineal Tear
description: Repair of obstetric anal sphincter injury following childbirth.

name: Manual Rotation and Assisted Delivery
description: Manual rotation of fetal head followed by assisted vaginal delivery.

name: Elective Caesarean Birth
description: Planned caesarean birth performed before onset of labour.

name: Emergency Caesarean Birth
description: Urgent caesarean birth performed for maternal or fetal indication.

name: Repeat Caesarean Birth
description: Caesarean birth in a patient with prior caesarean delivery.

name: Caesarean Birth with Tubal Sterilisation
description: Caesarean birth with concurrent tubal sterilisation procedure.

name: Repair of Uterine Extension at Caesarean Birth
description: Repair of unintended uterine incision extension during caesarean birth.

name: Manual Removal of Placenta
description: Manual removal of retained placenta from the uterus.

name: Examination Under Anaesthesia After Delivery
description: Post-delivery examination under anaesthesia for bleeding or suspected trauma.

name: Repair of Cervical Laceration
description: Surgical repair of cervical trauma sustained during labour or delivery.

name: Balloon Tamponade for Postpartum Haemorrhage
description: Insertion of uterine balloon tamponade device for postpartum haemorrhage control.

name: Compression Sutures for Postpartum Haemorrhage
description: Application of uterine compression sutures to control postpartum haemorrhage.

name: Exploratory Laparotomy for Obstetric Haemorrhage
description: Open abdominal exploration for major obstetric haemorrhage or suspected internal bleeding.

name: Obstetric Hysterectomy
description: Emergency hysterectomy performed for life-threatening obstetric haemorrhage or abnormal placentation.

name: Surgery for Abnormally Invasive Placenta
description: Surgical management of placenta accreta spectrum disorder.

name: Cervical Cerclage
description: Placement of cervical suture to reduce risk of preterm birth due to cervical insufficiency.
